tasks.title: Build MVP dashboard page
tasks.summary: Replace the placeholder dashboard with operating cards for projects, RFQs, suppliers, tenders, and next actions.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard route shows real app data where available

tasks.title: Build quote comparison UI
tasks.summary: Add a simple manual quote comparison page or panel connected to POST /api/v1/quotes/compare.
acceptance_criteria: User can enter supplier, scope, amount, and selected flag
UI displays lowest total, selected total, and delta

tasks.title: Complete estimating UI fields
tasks.summary: Add disposal, vendor quote, risk probability, and category breakdown to the Estimating page.
acceptance_criteria: Estimate payload supports vendor quote inputs

tasks.title: Prepare MVP deployment
tasks.summary: Add deployment docs and environment checklist for running frontend, backend, and Postgres in production.
